records.m_Talk_ENG: After much debate, you came to the conclusion
records.m_Talk_VTN:
Sau nhi87
9u cu87kc tranh lu86{n, ng95pi 96e95s 96ei 96e8691n k8691t lu86{n,
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nach langen 95nberlegungen bist du zum Schluss gekommen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apr958s un long moment de r959flexion et de nombreuses d959lib959rations,

records.m_Talk_ENG: that this employee, whom you'd been giving a lot of thought to, was absolutely necessary for the future ahead.
records.m_Talk_VTN: v87mi s87 suy x959t k8785 c95png, ng98~87oi nh95rn vi95xn n95py l95p ho95pn to95pn c86wn thi8691t cho t98~98qng lai ph95{a tr98~87mc c87wa ng95pi.
records.m_Talk_DEU: dass diese Mitarbeiterin, 9588ber die du so viel nachgedacht hast, absolut unverzichtbar f9588r die Zukunft des Unternehmens ist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: vous 95xtes arriv959 95p la conclusion que cette employ959e 959tait un 959l959ment vital pour votre entreprise et son futur.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you've decided
records.m_Talk_DEU: Daher hast du beschlossen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Vous avez donc d959cid959

records.m_Talk_ENG: that you'll be with her, no matter the consequences.
records.m_Talk_VTN: r86ng ng95pi s8689 ch87an c9580 86uy, b86ut ch86up h86{u qu86s ra sao.
records.m_Talk_DEU: sie an dich zu binden, egal was auch geschieht.
records.m_Talk_FRA: de rester 95p ses c9580t959s et la soutenir, peu importe les cons959quences.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called her to your office. She said she'd be here soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also hast du sie in dein B9588ro gerufen. Sie sagte, sie wolle bald da sein.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fort de cette d959cision, vous l'avez convoqu959e dans votre bureau. Elle ne devrait pas tarder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Before we talk business, how about a drink first?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Before we talk business, how about a drink first?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Before we talk business, how about a drink first?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? You think it's strange for a nun to offer a drink?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? You think it's strange for a nun to offer a drink?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? You think it's strange for a nun to offer a drink?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pfft, coming from someone who was constantly looking for me at the bar, isn't that a bit funny?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pfft, coming from someone who was constantly looking for me at the bar, isn't that a bit funny?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pfft, coming from someone who was constantly looking for me at the bar, isn't that a bit funny?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Probably... just as long as you don't get drunk and cause trouble, it should be fine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Probably... just as long as you don't get drunk and cause trouble, it should be fine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Probably... just as long as you don't get drunk and cause trouble, it should be fine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Besides, you know this already. I don't get drunk that easily.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Besides, you know this already. I don't get drunk that easily.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Besides, you know this already. I don't get drunk that easily.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if I don't get drunk, alcohol makes people honest. In a conversation like this, a drink might help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if I don't get drunk, alcohol makes people honest. In a conversation like this, a drink might help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if I don't get drunk, alcohol makes people honest. In a conversation like this, a drink might help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? You're making me a cocktail? Wait... you actually practiced for this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? You're making me a cocktail? Wait... you actually practiced for this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? You're making me a cocktail? Wait... you actually practiced for this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not bad. You've got some skills.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not bad. You've got some skills.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not bad. You've got some skills.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa... what is that smell?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa... what is that smell?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa... what is that smell?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What did you put in this?! It reeks!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What did you put in this?! It reeks!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What did you put in this?! It reeks!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Telling me I don't have to drink if I'm worried about causing trouble... Hah, is that really the best provocation you've got?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Telling me I don't have to drink if I'm worried about causing trouble... Hah, is that really the best provocation you've got?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Telling me I don't have to drink if I'm worried about causing trouble... Hah, is that really the best provocation you've got?

records.m_Talk_ENG: After all that effort, it'd be rude not to drink it, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: After all that effort, it'd be rude not to drink it, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: After all that effort, it'd be rude not to drink it, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huah!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huah!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huah!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This, is actually good! Tell me the recipe!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This, is actually good! Tell me the recipe!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This, is actually good! Tell me the recipe!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What's with that look? Don't tell me you didn't actually expect me to finish it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What's with that look? Don't tell me you didn't actually expect me to finish it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What's with that look? Don't tell me you didn't actually expect me to finish it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You want me to sign the contract? So that was your goal from the start?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You want me to sign the contract? So that was your goal from the start?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You want me to sign the contract? So that was your goal from the start?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... If I sign this, that means I'm stuck with you for life, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... If I sign this, that means I'm stuck with you for life, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... If I sign this, that means I'm stuck with you for life, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll sign it. With this contract, you won't be able to run away from me so easily either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll sign it. With this contract, you won't be able to run away from me so easily either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll sign it. With this contract, you won't be able to run away from me so easily either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, this is a perfect chance to fix your bad habit of bossing nuns around.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, this is a perfect chance to fix your bad habit of bossing nuns around.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, this is a perfect chance to fix your bad habit of bossing nuns around.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because I know you have it in you to be a good person.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because I know you have it in you to be a good person.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because I know you have it in you to be a good person.
